creator: kiboto6933@eyeremind.com
text:
I don't know if I set any NLS option, how do I check that?
reebsd% locale
LANG=C.UTF-8
LC_CTYPE="C.UTF-8"
LC_COLLATE="C.UTF-8"
LC_TIME="C.UTF-8"
LC_NUMERIC="C.UTF-8"
LC_MONETARY="C.UTF-8"
LC_MESSAGES="C.UTF-8"
LC_ALL=

I just run pkg update && pkg upgrade the rest if up to you. Just fix it if you like to.
